name: Tunde Adaramaja
shortBio: Founder & Managing Partner with over three decades of professional experience in accounting, auditing, taxation, and business consulting.
fullBio: Tunde Adaramaja is the Founder & Managing Partner of the firm; he is a seasoned Chartered Accountant and business leader with over three decades of professional experience spanning accounting, auditing, taxation, forensic investigation, and business consulting. He is a Certified Forensic Accountant and a Fellow of both the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN).

Tunde began his professional career in 1988 with BDO Balogun Badejo & Co. (Chartered Accountants), where he gained hands-on experience and developed the technical depth that would later define his distinguished career.

In 1999, he founded TAC Professional Services and set up a full operational office on Victoria Island in January 2021. The firm has since grown under his leadership into one of Nigeria's most visible and respected professional practices and business consulting firms, delivering high-profile Audit, Forensic, Taxation, and Advisory assignments across all sectors of the economy.

A passionate advocate of integrity and excellence, Tunde has contributed immensely to the development of the accounting and consulting profession in Nigeria through mentorship, leadership, and strategic innovation.

He is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN), the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN), and the Nigerian Institute of Management (NIM). He is also a Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) and holds a Master's Degree in Business Administration (MBA).

Tunde is an Associated Member of the Chartered Institute of Directors (CIoD), an alumnus of Harvard Business School, MIT Sloan School of Management and the Lagos Business School, and has participated in numerous executive programs and professional conferences locally and internationally.

name: Tunde Faniyi
shortBio: Distinguished Chartered Accountant with over two decades of professional experience in audit practice, taxation, and business consulting.
fullBio: Tunde Faniyi is a distinguished Chartered Accountant with over two decades of professional experience in audit practice, taxation, and business consulting. Renowned for his precision and excellence, he has successfully managed numerous audits, investigation, tax, and advisory engagements, consistently earning the trust and admiration of clients across various industries.

Tunde began his professional career with Osunbade Okiti & Co. (Chartered Accountants) in January 1999 and joined TAC Professional Services in April 2002. Since then, he has played a pivotal role—working alongside the founding partner—to build the firm into one of Nigeria's most respected professional services practices.

His professional expertise covers Business Assurance and Process Review, Tax Management and Advisory, Compliance and Risk Management, Due Diligence, and Reporting Accountancy, serving clients across key sectors of the economy.

Tunde is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and an alumnus of Abubakar Tafawa Balewa University. He also holds a Master's Degree in Business Administration (MBA) from Ahmadu Bello University and has attended numerous professional courses and conferences both locally and internationally.

name: Dr. Abraham Bamigboje
position: Associate Partner, Assurance & Transaction Advisory Services
shortBio: Distinguished finance professional with over 30 years of experience in audit, assurance, and internal control, particularly in oil and gas.
fullBio: Dr. Abraham Bamigboje is a distinguished finance and accounting professional with over 30 years of extensive experience spanning audit, assurance, internal control, finance, and systems review, particularly within the oil and gas industry.

He began his career with Ernst & Young (EY) in 1992 and later joined ExxonMobil in 1994, where he held several strategic roles across finance, control, and project management functions. Over nearly three decades at ExxonMobil, he rose through the ranks to the position of Senior Manager, consistently demonstrating excellence in leadership, governance, and performance management.

Dr. Bamigboje holds a Ph.D. in Transformational Leadership from Bakke University, Dallas, Texas, USA, and is a Certified Public Accountant (CPA, Illinois, USA), as well as a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (FCA) and the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (FCIT). He also holds an MBA and a B.Sc. in Accounting.

Renowned for his strategic insight and analytical depth, he brings expertise in strategic planning, costing methodologies, competitive market metrics analysis, management control reporting, and the design of business performance indicators and control tools.

Dr. Bamigboje currently serves as Associate Partner, Assurance & Transaction Advisory Services at TAC Professional Services, where he continues to contribute his wealth of experience and leadership to advancing the firm's standards of excellence.

name: Amaebi Fiderikumo
shortBio: Fellow of ICAN and Harvard Business School alumnus with over 20 years of experience in auditing, banking, and telecommunications.
fullBio: Amaebi is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (FCA) and an alumnus of Harvard Business School. He also successfully completed the prestigious Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) Institute qualifying examinations (USA) over a decade ago.

With over 20 years of diverse experience spanning auditing, banking, and the telecommunications industries in Nigeria and abroad, Amaebi has built a reputation for excellence in finance, strategy, and business leadership.

He has held several senior executive roles, including Group Executive Director, Finance at Alphamead Group, and Finance Director at IHS Nigeria, the country's largest telecommunications infrastructure and tower-sharing company. At IHS, he successfully managed relationships with leading global investors such as the International Finance Corporation (IFC), Goldman Sachs, Wendel of France, and other top-tier international private equity firms.

A results-driven professional with a proven track record of high performance, Amaebi is recognized for his ability to provide strategic financial leadership, attract and optimize resources, and drive organizational growth. His areas of expertise include financial planning, reporting and control; investment management; business modelling and valuation; and costing and pricing strategy.
He currently serves as Director, Business Advisory & Consulting at TAC Professional Services, where he continues to deliver innovative, value-driven solutions to clients across diverse sectors.

name: Mrs. Omolola Samuel
shortBio: Multi-dimensional finance professional with over 26 years of experience in accounting, audit, and compliance.
fullBio: Omolola is a multi-dimensional finance and accounting professional with over 26 years of progressive experience spanning accounting, statutory audit and assurance, investigations, due diligence, compliance and governance reviews, enterprise risk management, financial planning and reporting, and the design and implementation of robust internal control systems. She is a Fellow of both the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN).

Throughout her career, she has delivered strategic value across some of Nigeria's most reputable organizations, contributing to their growth, transformation, profitability, and long-term sustainability. Her deep understanding of business operations, combined with her analytical rigor and commitment to excellence, has enabled her to drive impactful outcomes for clients in aviation, oil and gas, manufacturing, trading, conglomerates, banking and financial services, education, NGOs, construction, hospitality, and government institutions.

Omolola began her professional journey in 1998 as an intern/audit trainee at Crowe Dafinone, Chartered Accountants. Over the course of 25 years, she rose through the ranks to lead the Audit Practice and ultimately serve as Partner, providing strategic oversight, client leadership, and mentoring to emerging professionals.

She holds a Higher National Diploma from the Federal Polytechnic, Ilaro, and earned her Master of Business Administration (MBA) from the prestigious Edinburgh Business School, Heriot-Watt University, in 2019.

She currently serves as Associate Partner, Audit & Assurance, where she leads the firm's high-level audit, advisory and compliance engagements across both the private and public sectors. She has led key ICFR advisory reviews for listed entities and regulatory bodies, including the Securities & Exchange Commission, delivering insights that strengthen governance, enhance operational efficiency, and reinforce stakeholder confidence.

name: Oluwole Adaramaja
position: Associate Director, Corporate Transactions, Compliance, Recovery & Liquidation
shortBio: Accomplished legal practitioner with extensive experience in corporate transactions, insolvency, and asset recovery.
fullBio: Oluwole Adaramaja is an accomplished legal practitioner with extensive experience in Corporate and Commercial Transactions, Secured Credit for Corporate and Individual Finance, Insolvency and Asset Recovery, Commercial Property and Conveyance, as well as General Civil and Commercial Litigation.

Over the years, he has successfully managed and advised on complex, multi-party disputes across State and Federal High Courts, demonstrating exceptional skill in both prosecution and defense. His work reflects a strong command of legal strategy, compliance, and business-oriented dispute resolution.

Wole obtained his LL.B from the prestigious Obafemi Awolowo University, Ile-Ife in 2002 and was called to the Nigerian Bar in 2004. He earned his Master of Laws (LL.M) from the same institution in 2016.

He began his legal career with Oluwakemi Balogun & Co (SAN), a leading Insolvency and Asset Recovery law firm in Lagos, where he served as an Associate between 2005 and 2006. He later joined Olalekan Yusuf & Co (SAN), also in Lagos, in 2006, where he gained in-depth exposure to litigation, commercial property, land disputes, conveyancing, and title perfection. His exceptional performance earned him promotion to Senior Associate, a role he held until 2008 before establishing his private practice.

Wole is the Managing Partner at Hoist Solicitors and currently serves as Associate Director, Corporate Transactions, Compliance, Recovery & Liquidation at TAC Professional Services, where he brings a wealth of legal and strategic insight to client engagements across multiple sectors.

name: Tunde Latinwo
shortBio: Results-oriented Business Development Executive with close to two decades of experience in financial services and consulting.
fullBio: Tunde Latinwo is a resourceful and results-oriented Business Development Executive with close to two decades of progressive experience spanning financial services, professional practice, and business consulting. He currently oversees Business Development and Corporate Services at TAC Professional Services, where he plays a pivotal role in driving strategic growth, client engagement, and operational excellence.

Tunde is highly skilled in business strategy design, market development, relationship management, and negotiation. His expertise lies in crafting and executing innovative business development models that enhance client value and organizational performance.

He began his professional career with United Bank for Africa Plc in 2006 as a Relationship Manager in the Commercial Banking Group and subsequently held several managerial positions across the Retail, Commercial, and Corporate Banking segments, successfully managing high-net-worth client portfolios and driving revenue growth.

Tunde holds a Master's Degree in Business Administration (MBA) from the prestigious Obafemi Awolowo University and a Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering from the University of Ilorin, Nigeria. He also holds a Certificate in Design Thinking & Creativity for Innovation from the University of Queensland, Australia.

name: James Oni
shortBio: Distinguished tax professional with over 15 years of experience in tax compliance, advisory, and financial reporting.
fullBio: James Oni is a distinguished tax professional and chartered accountant with over 15 years of progressive experience in tax compliance, advisory, and financial reporting across multiple industries, including Manufacturing, FMCG, Technology, Oil & Gas, and Financial Services. He currently serves as Director, TAC Tax Advisory Services at TAC Professional Services, where he leads a team of experts delivering innovative, compliant, and value-driven tax solutions.

A Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN), James is also a member of the Association of Accounting Technicians, West Africa (AATWA). He holds a Bachelor's Degree in Accounting from Olabisi Onabanjo University.

James began his career at Ijewere & Co. (Chartered Accountants and Tax Consultants), where he gained six years of practical experience before moving to Ascension Consulting Services as a Senior Consultant. He later joined Pedabo Professional Services (now Kreston Pedabo) in 2020 as a Manager, contributing significantly to complex tax audits, dispute resolution, and strategic advisory engagements.

His expertise spans tax risk management, due diligence, tax-efficient structuring, regulatory compliance, and dispute resolution. Known for his analytical precision and deep regulatory insight, James has consistently delivered measurable tax savings, optimized compliance frameworks, and strategic advisory outcomes for his clients.
He is also a sought-after facilitator and speaker at professional tax trainings and industry sessions, sharing practical insights on emerging tax trends and regulatory developments.

name: Muheez Popoola
p osition: Senior Manager, TAC Tax Advisory Services
shortBio: Highly skilled tax professional with over a decade of post-qualification experience in tax management and advisory.
fullBio: Muheez Popoola is a dependable, resourceful, and highly skilled tax professional with over a decade of post-qualification experience in tax management, advisory, and accountancy services. He has successfully led and managed tax advisory engagements covering tax planning, compliance, management, investigation, and regulatory advisory for clients across diverse sectors including Manufacturing, Construction, Real Estate, Oil & Gas, Trade, and Public Sector Agencies.

He began his professional career in 2010 as an Accountant with Obasanjo Holdings, before joining Yemi Sanni & Co (Chartered Accountants) in 2012 as an Associate Tax Consultant. In 2019, he joined Mazars Nigeria, where he advanced to Senior Associate, demonstrating exceptional expertise in complex tax engagements and client advisory. He later worked with Ascension Consulting Services in 2022, further strengthening his competence in strategic tax planning and compliance management.
Muheez joined TAC Professional Services in March 2023 as Tax Manager, where he continues to deliver high-value tax and advisory solutions that drive efficiency and compliance for clients.

He is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and the Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria (CITN). He holds an accounting degree from Moshood Abiola Polytechnic, Abeokuta.

name: Anjola Dapo Fagbure
shortBio: Dynamic Audit and Assurance professional with proven expertise in audit management and financial reporting.
fullBio: Anjola Dapo Fagbure is a dynamic and results-oriented Audit and Assurance professional with proven expertise in audit management, financial reporting, compliance, and consulting. She joined the firm in 2022 and currently serves as Manager, Audit & Assurance, where she leads and supervises audit teams in delivering quality-driven, standards-compliant engagements across multiple industries.

Anjola combines technical precision and leadership excellence, demonstrated through her effective management of complex audit assignments, preparation of audit reports and management letters, as well as her role in facilitating in-house training sessions to build team capacity.
She holds a Master's Degree in Managerial Psychology (2021) and a Bachelor's Degree in International Relations (2017)—both from Obafemi Awolowo University, Ile-Ife.

Anjola is an Associate Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN) and regularly participates in ICAN MCPE programs and Integra International workshops to stay updated on global developments in audit, consulting, and financial reporting.
